children.heading: Grants for research
children.label: a Grants for research
children.text: The Director of the Institute shall conduct, or make grants for the conduct of, research relevant to appropriate services for individuals with Alzheimer’s disease and related dementias and their families.

children.heading: Preparation of plan; contents; revision
children.label: b Preparation of plan; contents; revision
i
children.text: the epidemiology of, and the identification of risk factors for, Alzheimer’s disease and related dementias; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the development and evaluation of reliable and valid multidimensional diagnostic and assessment procedures and instruments; and

children.label: B
children.text: ensure that research carried out under the plan is coordinated with, and uses, to the maximum extent feasible, resources of, other Federal programs relating to Alzheimer’s disease and related dementias, including centers supported under , centers supported by the National Institute of Mental Health on the psychopathology of the elderly, relevant activities of the Administration on Aging, other programs and centers involved in research on Alzheimer’s disease and related dementias supported by the Department, and other programs relating to Alzheimer’s disease and related dementias which are planned or conducted by Federal agencies other than the Department, State or local agencies, community organizations, or private foundations.section 285e–2 of this title

Within one year after transmitting the plan required under paragraph (1), and annually thereafter, the Director of the Institute shall prepare and transmit to the Chairman of the Council such revisions of such plan as the Director considers appropriate.

children.heading: Consultation for preparation and revision of plan
children.label: c Consultation for preparation and revision of plan
children.text: In preparing and revising the plan required by subsection (b), the Director of the Institute shall consult with the Chairman of the Council and the heads of agencies within the Department.

children.heading: Grants for promoting independence and preventing secondary disabilities
children.label: d Grants for promoting independence and preventing secondary disabilities
A
children.text: promote greater independence, including enhanced independence in performing activities of daily living and instrumental activities of daily living, for persons with Alzheimer’s disease and related disorders; and

children.label: B
children.text: prevent or reduce the severity of secondary disabilities, including confusional episodes, falls, bladder and bowel incontinence, and adverse effects of prescription and over-the-counter medications, in such persons; and
model curricula for health care professionals, health care paraprofessionals, and family caregivers, for training and application in the use of such techniques.

children.heading: “Council on Alzheimer’s Disease” defined
children.label: e “Council on Alzheimer’s Disease” defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “Council on Alzheimer’s Disease” means the council established in section 11211(a) of this title.2See References in Text note below.2
